presets.name: German Payslip
presets.description: German Lohn-/Gehaltsabrechnung. Detects Steuerident-Nr., Rentenversicherungs-Nr., Krankenversicherungs-Nr., German dates, plus names, addresses and IBAN. Disables the noisy generic 'Amounts' detector so salary figures in tables aren't over-redacted.

presets.name: Italian Busta Paga
presets.description: Italian payslip. Detects Codice Fiscale, Partita IVA, Matricola INPS, Italian dates, plus names, addresses and IBAN. Disables the noisy generic 'Amounts' detector so salary figures in tables aren't over-redacted.

presets.name: US W-2 / Pay Stub
presets.description: US tax forms and pay stubs (W-2, W-4, 1099, generic paystubs). Detects SSN, EIN, US dates, US ZIP codes, plus names, addresses, account numbers and amounts (wages are sensitive on tax forms).

presets.name: Generic Invoice
presets.description: Generic invoice or receipt. Detects invoice numbers, dates (multiple formats), VAT IDs, plus names, addresses, IBAN, emails. Amounts are kept visible by default.

presets.name: Bank Statement
presets.description: Bank or credit card statement. Detects IBAN, BIC/SWIFT, masked card numbers, transaction references, dates, plus names, addresses, account numbers and amounts.
